overview: Death Skull is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Crypt, Goblin Cave, Ice Abyss, Ice Cavern, Inferno, Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): -74 HP, 10 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 3. Has a Staggered reaction in its ability set. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack at 200% ratio (200 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Nightmare.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Has Stagger Reaction (ImpactRes 1, Endurance 3)
strategies.description: This monster has a Staggered ability in its ability set, meaning it has a stagger reaction animation. ImpactResistance: 1, MaxImpactEndurance: 3.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000), Ice (-2000), Light (-2000), Divine (-1500). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Attack (200% ratio)
strategies.description: Attack deals 200 damage at base (200% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
